name: Technical Analysis
description: Compute technical indicators for a stock — SMA(20), SMA(50), EMA(12), EMA(26), RSI(14), MACD (line, signal, histogram), and an overall trend signal (bullish/bearish/neutral).
exampleQuery: Give me a technical analysis of AAPL

sampleResponse.summary: AAPL shows a bullish trend with RSI at 62 and price above SMA(50).
insights: RSI is neutral (62), MACD histogram is positive — momentum is bullish.
Price is well above SMA(50), confirming the uptrend.
